ai_governance_rules: Master Report must be appended only - never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

Whenever a homepage or other special slug is renamed in pages.json, build.py copy-logic referencing the old slug path must be updated in the same change — verify by checking build.py for hardcoded slug paths whenever a slug rename is made. See changelog 2026-06-30.

Before trusting any deploy command copied from this report, verify it does not exclude a file the current task needs to change. A successful rsync exit code only proves the files it was told to sync were synced -- it does not prove the right files were included. When a deploy is reported as "not working" despite a clean rsync summary, check the live file directly via SSH (ls -la + grep/diff the actual file on the server) before re-running the same deploy command again.
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST_ai_rules: NEVER modify files inside ./build/ — fully overwritten on every build
NEVER rewrite build.py from scratch — targeted edits only
NEVER run sed/perl/regex on build/ files
NEVER commit directly to main without human confirmation
NEVER guess paths or filenames — read Master Report first
NEVER deploy via GitHub Actions rsync — manual rsync only
NEVER leave send.php redirecting anywhere other than /thank-you/
NEVER delete fields from Master Report — append only
ALWAYS read Master Report in full before any bash command
ALWAYS snapshot before every risky change
ALWAYS verify changes with a read-back command before building
ALWAYS batch fact-finding commands into a single paste
ALWAYS confirm best practice and no guessing with every command
Content changes go in data/pages.json only
Layout changes go in theme/base.html only if unavoidable
build.py must generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml on every build
Homepage slug rule: after every build copy build/{homepage_slug}/index.html to build/index.html
NEVER commit directly to main during a session — no exceptions
NEVER attempt to run sed, perl, or text replacements on files inside ./build/ — it is ephemeral and fully overwritten on every build
AI must parse this entire Master Report completely before generating any bash commands — no blind regex strings or file overwrites allowed without tracking state dependencies first
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST_mandatory_session_wor: 1. READ this Master Report in full before any action
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. Commit and push only after local build verified clean
session_workflow_ai_mandatory_rules: Read Master Report before any work begins
Never commit directly to main during a session without human confirmation
Never make changes without telling the human exactly what will change first
Never run sed, perl, or regex on build/ files
Never rewrite build.py — targeted edits only
Never guess — always verify from disk
Batch all fact-finding into single commands
session_workflow_mandatory_session_workf: 1. bash session_start.sh "label" — creates git branch, protects main
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. bash session_end.sh "msg" — merge to main, push, clean snapshots
